page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6p-redis.large is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ecs.re6p family. It is provisioned with 2 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor. The hardware configuration features 2 physical cores with a single thread per core, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading. It includes 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core.

This instance operates on the KVM hypervisor and does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for data persistence. Network connectivity is configured with a baseline bandwidth of 1 Gbps. The instance does not bundle any graphics processing units or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

With its 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.re6p-redis.large offers a balanced resource density suitable for general-purpose workloads. The dedicated CPU allocation provides predictable compute performance, though the lack of local storage and modest 1 Gbps network baseline are key architectural tradeoffs to consider. This configuration is designed for lightweight database nodes, caching layers, and general-purpose application hosting that do not require high-throughput local I/O or intensive multi-threaded processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6p-redis.large is an x86_64 server instance within the ecs.re6p family, running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor, configured with 2 physical cores and 1 thread per core to deliver dedicated compute performance. The system is equipped with 8.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio. It contains no local storage and no GPUs, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps. This resource profile makes the instance suitable for lightweight general-purpose workloads, small database instances, caching layers, and basic web serving where dedicated CPU execution is required without the need for high-speed local storage or high-bandwidth networking.

tagline: A dedicated dual-core compute instance with a balanced memory profile and network-attached storage dependency for predictable, lightweight workloads.
bullet_points: Dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY processor with 2 physical cores and no hyperthreading.
8.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio.
KVM hypervisor-based virtualization with x86_64 architecture.
No local storage, requiring external network-attached block storage.
1 Gbps baseline network bandwidth and zero bundled GPUs.
Suited for lightweight caching, small databases, and general-purpose applications.
